ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the production data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the production data */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the production occurred */,
  "producer_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of producer */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy source */,
  "generation_mwh" REAL /* Amount of energy generated in megawatt-hours */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific energy plant */,
  "capacity_mwh" REAL /* Maximum capacity of the plant in megawatt-hours */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the energy production process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the plant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_producer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_type_id") REFERENCES producer_types ("producer_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("energy_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the state is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the state */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature of the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producer_types" (
  "producer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer type */,
  "producer_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the producer type */,
  "capacity_mwh" REAL /* Average capacity of producers of this type in megawatt-hours */,
  "number_of_producers" INTEGER /* Number of producers of this type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "energy_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "renewable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the source is renewable */,
  "average_cost_per_mwh" REAL /* Average cost of producing one megawatt-hour of energy from this source */,
  "capacity_factor" REAL /* Average capacity factor of the energy source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department associated with the role */,
  "permissions_count" INTEGER /* Number of permissions assigned to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource the permission applies to */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action allowed (e.g., read, write) */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Conditions under which the permission is valid */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource being accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., read, write) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecast model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for forecasting */,
  "accuracy_metric" REAL /* Accuracy metric of the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_results" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forecast model */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "producer_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the producer type */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy source */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecasted value in megawatt-hours */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the forecast */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for the forecast */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_results_producer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_type_id") REFERENCES producer_types ("producer_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_results_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("energy_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_results_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the historical data */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "producer_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the producer type */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy source */,
  "generation_mwh" REAL /* Amount of energy generated in megawatt-hours */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific plant */,
  "capacity_mwh" REAL /* Maximum capacity of the plant at the time of the historical data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("energy_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_producer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_type_id") REFERENCES producer_types ("producer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production record */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality metric */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the quality metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES energy_production ("production_id")
)
